title: Welcome
items: Welcome to HandyHub. These Terms and Conditions govern your access to and use of the HandyHub platform.
By accessing or using HandyHub, you agree to be legally bound by these Terms. Please scroll down and read them carefully before accepting.

title: 1. Definitions
items: HandyHub is a digital platform connecting users with independent service providers.
Users are individuals who browse or request services.
Service Providers are independent individuals or businesses offering services.
Services refer to professional tasks offered by providers.

title: 2. Nature of the Platform
items: HandyHub is a technology marketplace and does not directly provide services.
HandyHub does not employ, supervise, or guarantee service providers.
All agreements are between users and service providers.

title: 3. Eligibility
items: You must be at least 18 years old to use HandyHub.
You confirm that you have the legal capacity to enter agreements.

title: 4. Account Registration
items: Account creation may be required to access certain features.
You must provide accurate and up-to-date information.
You are responsible for maintaining your account security.

title: 5. User Responsibilities
items: Users must communicate honestly and respectfully.
Accurate service details must be provided.
Illegal or deceptive use is prohibited.

title: 6. Service Provider Responsibilities
items: Providers are independent contractors.
Providers must have required skills and licenses.
Services must be delivered professionally and safely.

title: 7. Payments and Fees
items: Payments may be handled through HandyHub or directly.
Service fees will be disclosed before confirmation.
HandyHub is not responsible for payment disputes.

title: 8. Cancellations and Refunds
items: Cancellation policies vary by provider.
Refunds are not guaranteed unless stated.
Disputes should be resolved amicably.

title: 9. Ratings and Reviews
items: Reviews must be based on real experiences.
False or abusive reviews are prohibited.
HandyHub may remove inappropriate content.

title: 10. Prohibited Conduct
items: Illegal or fraudulent use is forbidden.
Harassment or discrimination is not tolerated.
Security circumvention attempts are prohibited.

title: 11. Intellectual Property
items: All HandyHub branding and content are owned by HandyHub.
Content may not be copied without permission.

title: 12. Privacy
items: Use of HandyHub is subject to our Privacy Policy.
We take reasonable steps to protect user data.

title: 13. Limitation of Liability
items: HandyHub is not liable for damages arising from services.
Users engage providers at their own risk.

title: 14. Indemnification
items: You agree to indemnify HandyHub from claims arising from platform use.

title: 15. Suspension and Termination
items: Accounts may be suspended or terminated for violations.
Termination may occur without notice.

title: 16. Changes to Terms
items: Terms may be updated at any time.
Continued use implies acceptance.

title: 17. Governing Law
items: These Terms are governed by applicable local laws.

title: 18. Contact
items: Contact HandyHub through official support channels for inquiries.
